headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -44.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending down 23% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 153 quotes and 118 at strong intensity, driving a score of 49.1 — people are venting forcefully today.
• Despite the high volume, frustrations have dropped sharply from yesterday's 98.3 and sit in the lower half of their 174-day range (–0.9 to 170.1), suggesting intensity is elevated but overall momentum is easing.
• Fears and optimism are both subdued, with fears near their historical floor and optimism slightly recovered but still deep in negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
